vulkanmod.options.advCulling.tooltip: Use a culling algorithm that might improve performance by reducing the number of non visible chunk sections rendered.
vulkanmod.options.ao.subBlock.tooltip: ON (Sub-block): Enables smooth lighting for non full block (experimental).
vulkanmod.options.entityCulling.tooltip: Enables culling for entities on not visible sections.
vulkanmod.options.frameQueue.tooltip: Higher values might help stabilize frametime but will increase input lag.
vulkanmod.options.backfaceCulling.toolti: Culls not visible block faces on the CPU improving GPU performance. To prevent increased CPU overhead enable Indirect Draw.
vulkanmod.options.indirectDraw.tooltip: Reduces CPU overhead but might increases GPU overhead.
vulkanmod.options.fsr.tooltip: Render the world at a lower internal resolution, then upscale it before the HUD and menus are drawn.
vulkanmod.options.fsrInternalScale.toolt: Sets the world render resolution before FSR upscales it back to the current window resolution.
vulkanmod.options.casSharpness.tooltip: Contrast Adaptive Sharpening strength. Works independently of FSR upscaling. Higher values enhance local contrast and detail.
vulkanmod.options.uniqueOpaqueLayer.tool: Use a unique render layer for opaque terrain to improve performance.
vulkanmod.options.terrainShadowQuality.t: Controls the filtering cost of sun-shadow receiving on terrain and translucent world geometry.
vulkanmod.options.terrainLightingQuality: Controls the cost of the opaque and translucent terrain lighting model. Faster modes trade MakeUp-style sun response for performance.
vulkanmod.options.skyQuality.tooltip: Controls the custom sky renderer. Vanilla uses Mojang's sky, low and medium reduce custom sky features, and high keeps volumetric clouds.
vulkanmod.options.volumetricResolution.t: Scales the captured scene resolution used by volumetric lighting. Lower values improve performance but soften godrays.
vulkanmod.options.waterQuality.tooltip: Controls water reflection/refraction cost. Faster modes drop scene-space water effects first.
vulkanmod.options.volumetricLighting.too: Enables the fullscreen godray pass. Turning this off saves the volumetric post and its scene copy.
Samples the block emissive atlas in terrain shading. Disable this if emissive textures are not important and you want more terrain performance.
vulkanmod.options.qualityPreset.tooltip: Select a predefined quality preset. Changing this will override multiple rendering options at once.
vulkanmod.options.shaderQuality.tooltip:
Controls overall shader quality preset.§r
§aLOW: Best performance, minimal effects§r
§eMEDIUM: Balanced (default)§r
§cHIGH: Best visual quality, all effects enabled
vulkshade.effects.bloomStrength.tooltip: Controls bloom intensity. Higher values produce stronger glow around bright objects.
vulkshade.effects.pbrDebug.tooltip: Visualize PBR parameters to diagnose roughness, metallic, F0, AO, emissive, or albedo outputs.
vulkshade.effects.pbrNormalStrength.tool: Controls procedural bump normal strength. 0 = disabled, higher values add more texture-based surface detail.
vulkshade.effects.pbrSpecularStrength.to: Multiplier for the PBR specular highlight. 100% = default, higher values boost metallic/specular reflections.
vulkshade.fallback.safemode.tooltip: Vulkan compatibility issues detected. Running with reduced feature set.
vulkanmod.options.adaptivePerformance.to: Automatically adjust effect quality based on framerate. Lowers settings when FPS drops below 40, raises when above 80.
vulkanmod.options.framePacing.tooltip: Smoothens frame delivery by limiting frame time variance. Reduces micro-stutter.
vulkanmod.options.framePacingTarget.tool: Target framerate for frame pacing. Set to Unlimited for no frame time cap.
vulkanmod.options.chunkBatchRendering.to: Merge chunk meshes into batches to reduce draw calls. Significantly improves CPU performance.
Automatically adjust render distance based on framerate. Reduces distance when FPS drops, increases when stable.
vulkanmod.options.voxyLOD.tooltip: Enables Voxy-style multi-layer voxel LOD rendering. Replaces distant chunks with aggregated mesh representations for extreme view distances.
vulkanmod.options.voxyLODQuality.tooltip: Controls LOD transition distances and mesh detail. HIGH enables ultra-far rendering up to 512 blocks with smooth blending.
vulkanmod.options.voxyLODMaxDistance.too: Maximum view distance for LOD terrain. Higher values render more distant terrain but increase memory usage.
vulkanmod.options.feature.fog.tooltip: Enables biome-colored fog effects. Disable for a performance gain in foggy environments.
vulkanmod.options.feature.emissive.toolt: Enables emissive block texture rendering. Disable if emissive textures are not needed.
vulkanmod.options.feature.volumetric.too: Enables volumetric god-ray effects. Has a significant performance cost.
vulkanmod.options.feature.ssao.tooltip: Enables screen-space ambient occlusion for contact shadows on nearby geometry.
vulkanmod.options.feature.bloom.tooltip: Enables bloom post-processing for bright light sources and emissive surfaces.
vulkanmod.options.feature.pbr.tooltip: Enables physically-based deferred lighting with metalness/roughness workflow.
vulkanmod.options.feature.motionBlur.too: Enables directional motion blur based on camera movement. Adds cinematic blur to fast motion.
vulkshade.effects.motionBlurStrength.too: Controls how much the current frame blends into the previous. Higher values produce stronger trails.
vulkanmod.options.feature.lensFlare.tool: Enables lens flare and ghosting effects from bright light sources. Simulates camera lens artifacts.
